name: stay-in-your-lane
description: Enforce feature-based folder boundaries. No cross-feature imports.

scripts.build:
bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target node --format esm && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),f='dist/cli.js',s=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');fs.writeFileSync(f,s.replace(/^#!.*
(// @bun
)?/,'#!/usr/bin/env node
'))"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run test && bun run build
